title: Life at the Top
actors: Laurence Harvey, Jean Simmons, Honor Blackman
plot: In this sequel to Room at the Top (1958), Joe Lampton (Laurence Harvey) thinks he has really made it by marrying the boss's daughter in his northern mill town. But he finds he is being sidelined at work and his private life manipu...
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
